creator: michaelbuch12@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to J.R. Oldroyd from comment #2)

Thanks for the suggestion. You're probably right, I retried today and it doesn't crash.

There is one odd looking "ssid=0x00" but looks like that's handled fine.

Probably easy to test this by setting up a SSID with an UTF-8 character in it or something. I'd expect the application to safeguard against that (maybe it does this already). I might try this out, and if I can't repro it we could close this.
